textByHash.0d9dfaa1340127ae72f0c6a8c627d2d9d4c9922e: Little man stronger than big man. Hee hee, lardi dee, lardi da.
textByHash.6894cc4fbd2173c9cd00be1bc9ed4ed9a6eabd4a: Must save the orbs and kill the Khazard warlord. That will be fun, hee hee.
textByHash.b4e2e18267e1ad57f8544daf5ceb4c12237ca59f: Soon we're gonna have the sacred ceremony and boy am I going to party. Lock up your daughters. Hee hee.
textByHash.f82b575dad1f65015169b2191141933c225e9bc4: Hee hee, lardi da, lardi dee. (The gnome appears to be singing.)
